lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: Hello, and welcome to the Grand Exchange! How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a starter pack?

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: Here you go. One starter pack. Enjoy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: This is the Grand Exchange, the best trading spot in the land! People come from all across the country to buy and sell every item under the sun.

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: When you want to buy or sell an item, talk to the clerks in the middle. They'll tell you how to set up a trade offer.

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: Now, is there something I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about where I respawn when I die.

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: You're currently due to respawn somewhere else. Would you rather respawn here, at the Grand Exchange, instead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd like to respawn at the Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: Okay, you can respawn here when you die. Let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: You're currently due to respawn here, at the Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather respawn in Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: Please yourself. You will now respawn in Lumbridge when you die. Let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, respawning here sounds great.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me the price of an item?

lines.speaker: Brugsen Bursen
lines.text: What had you in mind?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.
